welcome.badge: Free for everyone · No credit card required
welcome.subtitle: Opportunities, tools, and honest guides for anyone building something real with AI — Africa, the diaspora, and the world.
welcome.cta.sub: No signup needed to use the tools · Account only to save results
welcome.features.title: Everything you need to build
welcome.features.subtitle: Six tools. One platform. All free. No account required to start.
welcome.features.opportunity.desc: Type any idea — get a 5-layer guide with real costs, failure analysis, tool stack, and step-by-step action plan.
welcome.features.chat.desc: Ask anything about building a business, automating work, or learning a skill. Powered by Groq. Always free.
welcome.features.studydesk.desc: Homework helper, essay outliner, research summarizer, citation generator, and coding practice — all in one.
welcome.features.devtools.desc: Code explainer, regex generator, JSON formatter, README builder, SQL writer, and API analyzer.
welcome.features.global.desc: Auto-detects your country. Shows prices in your currency. Recommends tools that work without a VPN.
welcome.features.income.desc: Real monthly costs, real failure reasons, real tool stacks. No hype. No upsells. Just signal.
welcome.how.title: How it works
welcome.how.subtitle: Three steps from idea to action plan
welcome.how.step1.title: Type your idea
welcome.how.step1.desc: Enter any business idea, automation concept, or income opportunity into the search bar. No login, no form, just type.
welcome.how.step2.title: Get a 5-layer guide
welcome.how.step2.desc: Kivora generates an honest breakdown: opportunity overview, real monthly costs, why most people fail, the best free tool stack, and a day-by-day action plan.
welcome.how.step3.title: Start building
welcome.how.step3.desc: Click "Start This" to track your journey, save the guide to your dashboard, or share it with someone who needs it.
welcome.why.title: Why Kivora is different
welcome.why.subtitle: Most AI tools are built for people who already have everything. We built this for everyone else.
welcome.why.card1.title: Real costs, not dreams
welcome.why.card1.desc: Every guide shows the actual monthly cost to run the business — not just the free trial.
welcome.why.card2.title: Honest failure analysis
welcome.why.card2.desc: We tell you exactly why most people quit this opportunity. Most sites don't.
welcome.why.card3.title: Works anywhere stack
welcome.why.card3.desc: Every tool recommendation shows if it works without a VPN and accepts local payment methods.
welcome.why.card4.title: Your currency
welcome.why.card4.desc: Auto-detects your country and shows prices in NGN, KES, GHS, GBP, EUR, and 7 more.
welcome.why.card5.title: No paywalls
welcome.why.card5.desc: Every tool on this platform is free. Forever. No credit card. No trial period.
welcome.why.card6.title: Gets smarter over time
welcome.why.card6.desc: Every guide you generate feeds our wiki. The platform learns and improves with every use.
welcome.testimonials.title: From builders like you
welcome.testimonials.1.quote: Found a WhatsApp bot opportunity I'd never considered. Had clients within 3 weeks.
welcome.testimonials.2.quote: The dev tools alone are worth bookmarking. Code explainer saved me hours.
welcome.testimonials.3.quote: Finally a platform that doesn't pretend everyone earns in dollars and has a US card.
welcome.cta_bottom.title: Your next move starts with a search.
welcome.cta_bottom.subtitle: No signup. No credit card. Just type what you want to build and see what's possible.
welcome.cta_bottom.placeholder: e.g. Build a chatbot business in Nigeria...

about.title: About Kivora
about.hero1: Built for the builder who doesn't have everything —
about.p1: Kivora is a free intelligence platform for developers, students, entrepreneurs, and anyone building something real with AI. It was created with one belief: that geography should not determine access to knowledge, tools, or opportunity.
about.problem_p1: Most AI platforms are designed for people in wealthy countries with fast internet, USD bank accounts, and VPN access. The guides assume you have a Stripe account. The tools assume you can pay $20/month without thinking about it. The income examples are in dollars — not because dollars are universal, but because the people building those products live in dollars.
about.problem_p2: There are billions of builders who don't fit that mold. Developers in Lagos who are world-class engineers but can't accept payments from certain clients. Students in Nairobi who need honest homework help without a paywall. Entrepreneurs in Accra building real businesses with $7/month tool stacks instead of $500/month SaaS subscriptions.
about.problem_p3: Kivora is for them. And for the diaspora builders connecting both worlds. And for everyone else who wants practical tools and honest information — not hype, not paywalls, not guides written by people who've never had to worry about exchange rates.
about.what.opportunity.desc: Real income guides with honest cost breakdowns, failure analysis, and tool stacks that work everywhere.
about.what.devtools.desc: Six AI-powered tools for developers — code explainer, regex gen, SQL builder, and more. Always free.
about.what.studydesk.desc: AI study tools for students and researchers — homework help, essay outlines, research summaries, citations.
about.what.chat.desc: A fast, free chatbot powered by Groq with knowledge of the platform's own content library.
about.value1.desc: We tell you why most people fail at an opportunity before we tell you how to start it. No fake income screenshots. No "6-figure in 30 days" promises.
about.value2.desc: No trial period. No paywall on the best features. No credit card required. Every tool works for everyone from day one.
about.value3.desc: The platform auto-detects your country, shows your local currency, and only recommends tools that actually work without a VPN.
about.value4.desc: Every search feeds the wiki. Every guide improves the next one. The platform compounds its knowledge over time.
about.cta_sub: No signup needed. Just type what you want to build.
